LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF DEVELOPERS SURETY AND INDEMNITY COMPANY'S MOTION FOR AMENDMENT OF JUDGMENT TO CORRECT CLERICAL ERROR. PLAINTIFF DEVELOPERS SURETY AND INDEMNITY COMPANY'S MOTION FOR AMENDMENT OF JUDGMENT TO CORRECT CLERICAL ERROR IS GRANTED. THE JUDGMENT ENTERED BY THIS COURT ON AUGUST 24, 2018 SHALL BE CORRECTED TO REFLECT THE CORRECT SPELLING OF THE NAME OF DEFAULTING DEFENDANT BRENDA ALESSANDRIA. DEFENDANT'S "MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT JUDGMENT" IS OFF CALENDAR BECAUSE IT LACKS A SEPARATE NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION (CRC 3.1110, 3.1112) AND IT WAS NOT TIMELY FILED AND SERVED AT LEAST 16 COURT DAYS PRIOR TO THE HEARING (CODE CIV. PROC. 1005). ORDER AND AMENDED JUDGMENT ARE SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-25-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Lyndon Y. Chee, Esq., Salamirad Morrow Timpane Dunn, 510-907-3245, appearing for Plaintiff
John G. Dooling, Esq., Ropers Majeski Kohn, 415-972-6319, appearing for Defendant Brenda Alessandria;

RULING - A R G U E D. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS BRENDA ALESSANDRIA, LOUIS ALESSANDRIA'S Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment.

Defendants Louis Alessandria and Brenda Alessandria's motion to set aside the default judgment entered against them on August 24, 2018 pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure section 473.5 is denied. (see word minutes for complete details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Rebecca Tovar CSR#14200, email: rtovar@sftc.org, Reported. =(302/EPS)

Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Developers Surety And Indemnity Company For Amendment Of Judgment To Correct Clerical Error
Off Calendar Mar-13-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DEVELOPERS SURETY AND INDEMNITY COMPANY's Motion For Amendment Of Judgment To Correct Clerical Error.

Plaintiff Developers Surety and Indemnity Company's motion for amendment of judgment to correct clerical error is granted. The judgment entered by this Court on August 24, 2018 shall be corrected to reflect the correct spelling of the name of defaulting defendant Brenda Alessandria. Defendant's "motion to set aside default judgment" is off calendar because it lacks a separate notice of motion and motion (CRC 3.1110, 3.1112) and it was not timely filed and served at least 16 court days prior to the hearing (Code Civ. Proc. 1005).

Order and amended judgment are signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
